name: Charge types management
fullName: UI ~ Administration TM Receivable: Charge types management

steps.name: When the user goes to the home page
When the user navigates to collections charge types module
When the user creates a charges types with:
When the user finds a charge type within "30" pages with status "Habilitado"
When the user updates "<last_charge_type_name>" charges type with:
When the user creates or finds within "40" pages charges types with status "Habilitado":
When the user modified the charge type in "Deshabilitado":
When the user creates or finds within "40" pages charges types with status "Deshabilitado":
When the user modified the charge type in "Habilitar":
